executives.name: Dan Shugar
executives.background: Dan Shugar is the founder and CEO of Nextracker. A solar industry veteran, he previously served as CEO of Solaria Corporation and President of SunPower Corporation, Systems Division. He has over 30 years of experience in the solar industry.

executives.name: Howard Wenger
executives.background: Howard Wenger has served as President of Nextracker since February 2022. He previously held executive leadership roles at SunPower Corporation, including President of Business Units and President of SunPower Systems.

executives.name: Chuck Alander
executives.background: Chuck Alander serves as the Chief Financial Officer. He joined Nextracker from Flex, where he held various senior financial leadership roles.

executives.name: Bruce Ledesma
executives.background: Bruce Ledesma is the President of Strategy and General Counsel. He previously served as General Counsel for SunPower Corporation and SolarCity.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Knight
board_of_directors.background: Former partner at PwC with extensive experience in audit and risk management.

board_of_directors.name: Kristi Hummel
board_of_directors.background: Chief People Officer at Skillsoft and former HR executive at Dell Technologies.

board_of_directors.name: Founder and former CEO
board_of_directors.background: Founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor; Chairman of Enphase Energy.

sources.source_description: Nextracker Inc. Form 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2024
